analysis.reasoning: Core message: Russia welcomes a UNODC–FIFA MOU to strengthen international cooperation against corruption and crime in sport, noting a Russian statement of support at the ceremony. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – Partially related to multilateralism, but the tweet frames support for a UN–FIFA initiative, not an alternative to the West or non-Western cooperation; thus not promoted. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – Yes; Russia publicly welcomes and supports international cooperation to fight corruption/crime, presenting itself as constructive and reliable. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – No claim of leadership or superiority. RU6 (Culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3.
